solution: 
```cpp
class Solution {
public:
    int subtractProductAndSum(int n) {
        int product = 1;
        int sum = 0;
        while (n > 0) {
            int digit = n % 10;
            product *= digit;
            sum += digit;
            n /= 10;
        }
        return product - sum;
    }
};
```
efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(log n)
space complexity: O(1)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: The algorithm iteratively extracts each digit of the number using modulo and division operations. It computes the product and sum of the digits in a single pass, resulting in logarithmic time complexity with respect to the number of digits in n. The space used is constant, making it very efficient.
